name: production-readiness
description: Agent skill and Codex-compatible plugin for production readiness reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Review whether a project is ready for production.
interface.longDescription: Evidence-first production readiness reviews for demo apps, APIs, web apps, full-stack projects, and general software projects.
defaultPrompt: Review this project for production readiness.
Run a launch-readiness review for this demo app.
Check this API for release blockers.
